zh.summary: 据报道，凯尔特人正在考虑签约立陶宛中场球员基尼蒂斯，以填补恩格尔斯离队留下的空缺。转会传闻还涉及流浪者队的转会目标和其他球员的即将动向。

title: Fifa explains decision to rule out Germany goal
summary: FIFA has defended its decision to disallow Germany's extra-time goal against Paraguay, explaining that referees and coaches were briefed beforehand about penalties for the specific type of foul that led to the disallowed goal.
content: Fifa says coaches and players were told before the World Cup referees will punish the type of foul that saw Germany's extra-time goal against Paraguay ruled out.

zh.title: 国际足联解释德国进球被吹罚的决定
zh.summary: 国际足联为其取消德国对巴拉圭加时赛进球的决定进行了辩护，解释说裁判和教练事先已被通知有关导致进球被吹罚的特定犯规类型的处罚规则。

title: Mexico oust Ecuador, 1st WC KO win in 40 years
summary: Mexico secured their first World Cup knockout stage victory in four decades, defeating Ecuador 2-0 in front of a passionate crowd at the Estadio Azteca.
content: Mexico won their first World Cup knockout stage match in 40 years after dispatching Ecuador 2-0 in front an electric crowd at Estadio Azteca on Tuesday.

zh.title: 墨西哥淘汰厄瓜多尔，40年来首次世界杯淘汰赛胜利
zh.summary: 墨西哥在阿兹特克体育场前充满热情的观众面前以2-0击败厄瓜多尔，获得了四十年来的首次世界杯淘汰赛胜利。

title: Deschamps 'touched' by Mbappe's goal tribute
summary: France coach Didier Deschamps expressed deep emotion over Kylian Mbappé's tribute goal during Les Bleus' commanding 3-0 Round of 16 victory over Sweden. Mbappé embraced the coach after dedicating his opening goal to him.
content: France coach Didier Deschamps said he was deeply moved by Kylian Mbappé's embrace after the captain dedicated his opening goal to him during Les Bleus' 3-0 World Cup Round of 16 win over Sweden.

zh.title: 德尚为姆巴佩进球致敬而'感动'
zh.summary: 法国教练迪迪埃·德尚对基利安·姆巴佩在法国队对瑞典队16强赛3-0胜利中的致敬进球表示深深的感动。姆巴佩在将自己的开场进球献给教练后拥抱了他。

title: England's Tuchel: Big-name WC exits can 'calm us'
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel believes that unexpected World Cup eliminations for Germany and the Netherlands will temper expectations and prevent overconfidence heading into their Round of 16 match against Congo DR.
content: Thomas Tuchel has said surprise early World Cup exits for Germany and Netherlands will "calm our minds" and help England not to "over-expect" when facing Congo DR.

zh.title: 英格兰主帅图赫尔：大牌球队世界杯出局可以'让我们冷静'
zh.summary: 英格兰主帅托马斯·图赫尔认为，德国和荷兰在世界杯中的意外出局将缓和预期，防止球队在对阵刚果民主共和国的16强赛前过度自信。

title: FIFA clarifies crucial call to disallow Germany go...
summary: FIFA has detailed the stricter refereeing standards that resulted in Germany having a potential match-winning goal disallowed, contributing to their shocking World Cup elimination.
content: FIFA explained Tuesday the tighter regulations that resulted in Germany having a potentially game-winning goal disallowed in their shock elimination from the World Cup.

zh.title: FIFA澄清关键判罚取消德国进球...
zh.summary: FIFA详细说明了更严格的裁判标准，这导致德国一个可能改变比赛结果的进球被判无效，从而导致了他们令人震惊的世界杯出局。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 24
summary: A playful guessing game challenges readers to identify a featured World Cup player based on their squad number and attempt to do so efficiently.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜一猜世界杯24号球星
zh.summary: 一个有趣的猜谜游戏向读者发出挑战，让他们根据球衣号码识别世界杯球星，并尝试快速给出答案。

title: Mexico rampant at fortress Azteca - and England could be next
summary: Mexico's defensive prowess at the Azteca Stadium—remaining unbeaten and unscored upon in four matches—poses a significant challenge for England in their World Cup Round of 16 encounter.
content: Mexico have won all four games and not conceded a goal at this World Cup. Their last-16 opponents must also contend with playing at the Azteca Stadium.

zh.title: 墨西哥在阿兹台克堡垒势不可挡——英格兰可能是下一个
zh.summary: 墨西哥在阿兹台克球场的防线能力——四场比赛保持不败且零封——对英格兰在世界杯十六强赛中构成重大挑战。

title: I'd have done the same to get him sent off - 20 years since Rooney's red card
summary: Wayne Rooney reflects on his controversial red card from the 2006 World Cup quarter-final against Portugal, discussing the incident with Cristiano Ronaldo and its lasting impact two decades later.
content: Former England striker Wayne Rooney talks about his red card in the 2006 World Cup quarter-final against Portugal, and the reaction of his then teammate Cristiano Ronaldo.

zh.title: 我也会这样做把他赶出场——鲁尼红牌事件20年后
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼反思他在2006年世界杯四分之一决赛对阵葡萄牙时的有争议的红牌，讨论与克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多的事件及其20年后的持久影响。

title: 'I remember like it was yesterday' - Euro 2016 hero Robson-Kanu
summary: Hal Robson-Kanu reminisces about his iconic goal for Wales against Belgium at Euro 2016, marking a decade since the memorable quarter-final performance in Lille.
content: Hal Robson-Kanu reflects on scoring his iconic goal for Wales against Belgium at Euro 2016, 10 years to the day from the quarter-final in Lille.

zh.title: 我记得就像昨天一样——欧洲杯2016英雄罗布森-卡努
zh.summary: 哈尔·罗布森-卡努回忆起他在欧洲杯2016中为威尔士对阵比利时的标志性进球，这距离在里尔的难忘四分之一决赛表现已有十年。

title: Pulisic says he is fit, ready to go for USMNT
summary: Christian Pulisic confirmed his fitness and readiness for the USMNT's World Cup round-of-32 match against Bosnia and Herzegovina on Wednesday. The U.S. attacker indicated he is prepared to play the full distance regardless of match duration.
content: United States men's national team attacker Christian Pulisic said he is ready to go the distance in the team's World Cup round-of-32 match against Bosnia and Herzegovina on Wednesday, no matter how long the game lasts.

zh.title: 普利西奇表示他状态良好，准备好为USMNT出战
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂安·普利西奇确认了他的身体状况良好，为USMNT对阵波黑的世界杯32强比赛做好了准备。这场比赛定于周三进行。这位美国前锋表示，无论比赛如何进行，他都已准备好全力出战。

title: ⭐ Paris Hilton, Brad Pitt top celebs at World Cup
summary: High-profile celebrities including Paris Hilton and Brad Pitt are attending the 2026 FIFA World Cup in North America. The event is drawing significant celebrity presence and attention.
content: Celebrities aren't hard to find at the 2026 FIFA World Cup in North America.

zh.title: 巴黎·希尔顿、布拉德·皮特等顶级明星出席世界杯
zh.summary: 包括巴黎·希尔顿和布拉德·皮特在内的高知名度名人正在参加2026年在北美举办的FIFA世界杯。该赛事吸引了大量明星的出席和关注。

title: When it comes to Norway's World Cup dreams, it's a...
summary: Norway's World Cup ambitions heavily depend on striker Erling Haaland and his ability to deliver goals despite support from a talented squad. The team's success rests significantly on the shoulders of their star forward.
content: While he has a very talented and capable supporting cast, Norway's dreams of World Cup glory rest on the shoulders, and goals, of Erling Haaland.

zh.title: 说到挪威的世界杯梦想……
zh.summary: 挪威的世界杯抱负在很大程度上取决于前锋埃尔林·哈兰德的进球能力，尽管他得到了一支天才球队的支持。这支球队的成功在很大程度上取决于他们的明星前锋。

title: France have Mbappé but are so much more -- and tha...
summary: France demonstrates formidable attacking firepower extending beyond Kylian Mbappé, with their dominant win over Sweden showcasing their depth. The team's comprehensive attacking capabilities make them a difficult opponent to overcome.
content: How do you beat a team with so much attacking firepower? If France's win over Sweden is any indication, it might be impossible.

zh.title: 法国拥有姆巴佩，但远不止于此
zh.summary: 法国展现了超越基利安·姆巴佩的强大进攻火力，他们对瑞典的压倒性胜利展示了球队的深度。球队全面的进攻能力使他们成为难以战胜的对手。

title: Nagelsmann: Germany no longer 'first-class team'
summary: Manager Julian Nagelsmann described Germany as no longer a "first-class team" following their penalty shootout elimination from the World Cup. Despite the criticism, Nagelsmann expressed his desire to remain as head coach.
content: ulian Nagelsmann said Germany are no longer a "first-class team" after another early World Cup exit, but added he wants to stay on as head coach following their penalty shootout defeat to Paraguay.

zh.title: 纳格尔斯曼：德国不再是"一流球队"
zh.summary: 主教练朱利安·纳格尔斯曼在德国因点球大战被淘汰出世界杯后，将德国描述为不再是"一流球队"。尽管遭到批评，纳格尔斯曼表示他希望继续担任主教练。

title: Grades for every team eliminated from the World Cu...
summary: ESPN is providing performance grades for all 47 teams eliminated from the World Cup, evaluating how each team performed relative to expectations. The comprehensive analysis assesses the tournament runs of every eliminated side.
content: When the World Cup ends, 47 teams will have been eliminated, and we're grading every one on how their run compared with expectations.

zh.title: 对世界杯所有被淘汰球队的评分
zh.summary: ESPN为世界杯所有47支被淘汰的球队提供成绩评分，评估每支球队相对于预期的表现。这份全面分析评估了每支被淘汰球队的锦标赛表现。
